title: Resource Planning Platform
problemStatement: Resource allocation lacked a structured, skill-based planning model and there was limited visibility into utilization and revenue linkage.
solution: Built a unified planning interface in Zoho Creator for skill-based allocation, calendar-driven planning, and automated timesheet conversion linked with Zoho Projects. Designed KPIs covering performance hours, deviations, project exposure, and skill progression.
impact: Improved utilization transparency, enabled more informed workforce planning, and strengthened revenue forecasting through operational metrics.
leadershipValue: Connected resource decisions to leadership visibility by translating attendance, task progress, and delivery signals into expected, potential, and actual revenue views.

interactionFiles.label: Interactive case brief
interactionFiles.description: Leadership-oriented walkthrough of the operating challenge, system response, and business value.
